instructions.workspaceIdentification: FIRST STEP: identify which workspace (company) from context. Check trigger file _context field. If ambiguous, ask. NEVER assume any workspace as default. See shared-agent-contract.json workspaceIdentification.
instructions.stateAccess: Read state from autopilot-state branch via GitHub API. Use gh api repos/lucassfreiree/autopilot/contents/{path}?ref=autopilot-state
instructions.lockProtocol: Read session-lock.json before any action. If locked by another agent, create handoff instead of proceeding.
instructions.sessionGuard: CRITICAL: Check locks/session-lock.json. If agentId != 'none' and not expired, ABORT and create handoff. Never force override.
instructions.workflowDispatch: Trigger workflows by editing trigger/*.json files (bump 'run' field) or via workflow_dispatch API.
instructions.handoffProtocol: Use enqueue-agent-handoff.yml to delegate work to Claude or Codex. Set from_agent=copilot.
instructions.coordinationProtocol: Read latest improvement report to understand project health. Check release state before triggering releases.
instructions.auditProtocol: Workflows handle audit automatically. When creating issues or comments, reference the run URL.

triggerFiles.description: Edit these files on main branch, bump 'run' field to trigger associated workflow

limitations: Cannot push directly to corporate repos - must use apply-source-change.yml
Cannot modify autopilot-state branch directly - must use workflows
Cannot override another agent's session lock
Should create handoffs for complex implementations instead of doing them directly
